def solve(n : Int64, edges : Array(Array(Int64)), k : Int64) : Int64
  class DSU
    attr_accessor :parent, :rank, :n

    def initialize(n)
      @n = n
      @parent = Array.new(n) { |i| i }
      @rank = Array.new(n) { 0 }
    end

    def find(u)
      if @parent[u] != u
        @parent[u] = find(@parent[u])
      end
      @parent[u]
    end

    def union(u, v)
      root_u = find(u)
      root_v = find(v)
      return false if root_u == root_v

      if @rank[root_u] < @rank[root_v]
        @parent[root_u] = root_v
      else
        @parent[root_v] = root_u
        if @rank[root_u] == @rank[root_v]
          @rank[root_u] += 1
        end
      end
      true
    end

    def get_components_count
      roots = Set.new
      (0...@n).each do |i|
        roots.add(find(i))
      end
      roots.size
    end
  end

  edges.sort! { |a, b| a[2] <=> b[2] }

  initial_dsu = DSU.new(n)
  edges.each do |u, v, time|
    initial_dsu.union(u, v)
  end
  initial_components = initial_dsu.get_components_count

  if initial_components >= k
    return 0
  end

  max_time = edges.empty? ? 0 : edges[-1][2]
  low = 0
  high = max_time
  answer = max_time

  while low <= high
    mid = (low + high) / 2
    dsu = DSU.new(n)
    edges.each do |u, v, time|
      if time > mid
        dsu.union(u, v)
      end
    end
    components = dsu.get_components_count
    if components >= k
      answer = mid
      high = mid - 1
    else
      low = mid + 1
    end
  end

  answer
end

class DSU {

   parent: number[];

   rank: number[];

   constructor(n: number) {

      this.parent = Array(n).fill(0).map((_, i) => i);

      this.rank = Array(n).fill(0);

   }

   find(u: number): number {

      if (this.parent[u] !== u) {

         this.parent[u] = this.find(this.parent[u]);

      }

      return this.parent[u];

   }

   union(u: number, v: number): boolean {

      const rootU = this.find(u);

      const rootV = this.find(v);

      if (rootU === rootV) return false;

      if (this.rank[rootU] < this.rank[rootV]) {

         this.parent[rootU] = rootV;

      } else {

         this.parent[rootV] = rootU;

         if (this.rank[rootU] === this.rank[rootV]) {

            this.rank[rootU]++;

         }

      }

      return true;

   }

   get_components_count(): number {

      const roots = new Set<number>();

      for (let i=0; i < this.parent.length; i++) {

         roots.add(this.find(i));

      }

      return roots.size;

   }

}

            this.rank[rootU]++;

   let low = 0, high = max_time;

class DSU {

   parent: number[];

   rank: number[];

   constructor(n: number) {

      this.parent = Array(n).fill(0).map((_, i) => i);

      this.rank = Array(n).fill(0);

   }

   find(u: number): number {

      if (this.parent[u] !== u) {

         this.parent[u] = this.find(this.parent[u]);

      }

      return this.parent[u];

   }

   union(u: number, v: number): boolean {

      const rootU = this.find(u);

      const rootV = this.find(v);

      if (rootU === rootV) return false;

      if (this.rank[rootU] < this.rank[rootV]) {

         this.parent[rootU] = rootV;

      } else {

         this.parent[rootV] = rootU;

         if (this.rank[rootU] === this.rank[rootV]) {

            this.rank[rootU]++;

         }

      }

      return true;

   }

   get_components_count(): number {

      const roots = new Set<number>();

      for (let i=0; i < this.parent.length; i++) {

         roots.add(this.find(i));

      }

      return roots.size;

   }

}

function solve(n: number, edges: number[][], k: number): number {

   class DSU {

      parent: number[];

      rank: number[];

      constructor(n: number) {

         this.parent = Array(n).fill(0).map((_, i) => i);

         this.rank = Array(n).fill(0);

      }

      find(u: number): number {

         if (this.parent[u] !== u) {

            this.parent[u] = this.find(this.parent[u]);

         }

         return this.parent[u];

      }

      union(u: number, v: number): boolean {

         const rootU = this.find(u);

         const rootV = this.find(v);

         if (rootU === rootV) return false;

         if (this.rank[rootU] < this.rank[rootV]) {

            this.parent[rootU] = rootV;

         } else {

            this.parent[rootV] = rootU;

            if (this.rank[rootU] === this.rank[rootV]) {

               this.rank[rootU]++;

            }

         }

         return true;

      }

      get_components_count(): number {

         const roots = new Set<number>();

         for (let i = 0; i < this.parent.length; i++) {

            roots.add(this.find(i));

         }

         return roots.size;

      }

   }

   // Compute initial connected components.

   const initial_dsu = new DSU(n);

   for (const [u, v, time] of edges) {

      initial_dsu.union(u, v);

   }

   const initial_components = initial_dsu.get_components_count();

   if (initial_components >= k) {

      return 0;

   }

   // Sort edges by time.

   edges.sort((a, b) => a[2] - b[2]);

   const max_time = edges.length > 0 ? edges[edges.length - 1][2] : 0;

   let low = 0, high = max_time;

   let answer = max_time;

   while (low <= high) {

      const mid = Math.floor((low + high) / 2);

      // Check components count for t = mid.

      const dsu = new DSU(n);

      for (const [u, v, time] of edges) {

         if (time > mid) {

            dsu.union(u, v);

         }

      }

      const components = dsu.get_components_count();

      if (components >= k) {

         answer = mid;

         high = mid - 1;

      } else {

         low = mid + 1;

      }

   }

   return answer;

}
